I understand that TrustyDr is a technology platform and not a medical provider. I consent to share my information with the healthcare provider I select for the purpose of receiving medical services.
name: Name

about.title: About Us
about.p1: TrustyDr helps patients find trusted and verified doctors. Patients can view doctor profiles, read reviews from other patients, and choose doctors with confidence based on real experiences.
about.p2: In Iraq, finding a doctor often requires searching for phone numbers and making multiple calls, sometimes only to find that the doctor is unavailable or traveling. TrustyDr solves this by providing clear doctor information and real-time availability in one place.
about.p3: Patients no longer need to arrive early and wait for hours at clinics. With TrustyDr, you can view a doctor’s schedule, book a specific time, and arrive when it’s your turn — saving time and reducing unnecessary waiting.
about.p4: TrustyDr allows patients to add their medical conditions, history, and important health information. Doctors can review this information before the visit, helping them understand the patient better and provide more accurate care.

help.title: Help & Support
help.p1: If you need help using TrustyDr or have questions about appointments, doctors, or features, our support team is here to assist you.
help.p2: You can contact us anytime by email at support@trustydr.com and our team will respond as soon as possible.
help.p3: We value your feedback. If you have suggestions or ideas to improve TrustyDr, please share them with us. Your input helps us make the app better for everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: TrustyDr is committed to protecting your personal and medical information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, process, and safeguard your data when you use the TrustyDr platform.
privacy.p2: We may collect personal information including your name, phone number, email address, appointment history, and medical details you voluntarily provide for booking and consultation purposes.
privacy.p3: Your medical information is shared only with the healthcare provider you select for the purpose of delivering medical care. TrustyDr does not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to third parties.
privacy.p4: We implement administrative, technical, and security safeguards to protect your data. However, no digital platform can guarantee absolute security.
privacy.p5: Data may be stored securely on cloud infrastructure and may be processed outside your country of residence in compliance with applicable laws.
privacy.p6: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, subject to medical record retention requirements.
privacy.p7: By using TrustyDr, you consent to the collection and processing of your information as described in this policy.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.p1: TrustyDr is a technology platform that enables patients to search for healthcare providers and book appointments. TrustyDr does not provide medical advice or treatment.
terms.p2: Healthcare providers listed on TrustyDr are independent professionals responsible for the medical services they provide.
terms.p3: Patients are responsible for providing accurate and complete information when booking appointments.
terms.p4: Appointment availability, cancellations, fees, and medical decisions are managed directly by the healthcare provider.
terms.p5: TrustyDr is not responsible for medical outcomes, treatment decisions, or provider availability.
terms.p6: TrustyDr reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that misuse the platform.
terms.p7: These Terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

legal.title: Legal & Medical Disclaimer
legal.p1: TrustyDr is not a medical provider. It is a digital platform facilitating appointment scheduling between patients and independent healthcare professionals.
legal.p2: All medical advice, diagnosis, and treatment are provided solely by licensed healthcare providers.
legal.p3: TrustyDr does not guarantee medical results, provider availability, or treatment outcomes.
legal.p4: TrustyDr is not intended for emergency medical situations. In case of emergency, contact local emergency services immediately.
legal.p5: To the maximum extent permitted by law, TrustyDr disclaims liability for medical decisions, treatment outcomes, or damages arising from the use of the platform.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: TrustyDr helps patients find doctors, view their availability, and book appointments easily without the need for phone calls.
faq.a2: Doctors on TrustyDr provide professional information and are reviewed by patients. Verification processes may vary by location and specialty.
faq.q3: Can I choose a specific appointment time?
faq.a3: Yes, you can view available schedules and book a specific time that works best for you.
faq.a4: TrustyDr is free for patients to browse doctors and book appointments. Some services may be managed directly by doctors.
faq.a5: Yes. TrustyDr takes data privacy seriously and shares your medical information only with doctors you choose.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you need assistance or have questions about TrustyDr, you can contact us by email at support@trustydr.com.
contact.p2: Our support team is available to help you with technical issues, account questions, or general inquiries.
contact.p3: We welcome your feedback and suggestions. Your input helps us improve TrustyDr and provide a better experience for everyone.

home.no_notifications_message: Find a trusted doctor today and book your appointment in minutes.
